steps: Log in or create a free Novu account at https://dashboard-v2.novu.co/auth/sign-up
Your API key is displayed on the API Keys page
Click the copy icon next to the API key to copy it
Use the key with the 'ApiKey' prefix in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: ApiKey <your-key>'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Novu API key, used with the 'ApiKey' prefix in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available with up to 30,000 events/month
EU region API is available at https://eu.api.novu.co/v1
Separate API keys are issued per environment (Development, Production)

test_endpoint.description: List all environments to verify the API key is valid
